text: Revenue growth volatility represents a material business risk. While Q4 2025 showed 3.44% YoY revenue growth and Q3 2025 demonstrated 1.96% growth, Q2 2025 experienced a significant contraction of -8.21% YoY (K001). This inconsistency in top-line performance suggests susceptibility to macroeconomic conditions, customer spending patterns, or competitive pressures. Net income growth followed a similar pattern, with Q2 2025 declining -10.48% YoY before recovering to +4.79% in Q3 and +4.74% in Q4 (K002). The volatility indicates potential sensitivity to economic cycles or execution challenges that could impact future periods.
